REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $268.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT GAMALONG JR, RICARDO V.
